creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
pav@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: cannot run amarok after math/fftw3 upgrade
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: pav
> State-Changed-When: Tue Jun 9 16:48:26 UTC 2009
> State-Changed-Why: 
> fftw is at libfftw3.so.5, so it's clearly a problem that your amarok binary still uses old .so.4
> You need to resolve this problem first

Okay, I have it:

Solution: 

reinstall all dependend ports to fftw3. (portupgrade -Rf)

Maybe not realy all, but at least the ports which start with "lib..." in
ther name - and amarok.

I used always the portupgrade flag "-u" to uninstall old shared libs.
(maybe that is already enough to fix the problem ... I don't know)

But this should mentioned in ports/UPDATING

thank you for support. I you like, close this PR
